commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a reusable dSYM DWARF path and architecture helper, calls it from release signing/notarization, adds shell fixture coverage, wires that test into lint, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a release-tooling refactor/test PR rather than a bug report. I source-inspected the signing path and ran the new shell fixture from the PR head in the scratch directory.
